description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open with a document containing a US Census Bureau press release about income and poverty statistics. Format the document title ('U.S. Census Bureau News') with Heading 1 style and apply Heading 2 style to the section headers: 'Overview', 'Income', 'Poverty', 'Supplemental Poverty Measure', 'Health Insurance Coverage', and 'Contact Information'. Ensure body paragraphs use Normal style. Save the changes to the document.
